meta.source: DID Sarawak / Macaranga / Borneo Post / Frontiers in Water — hand-encoded historical hotspots

properties.name: Taman Desa Wira (Batu Kawa)
properties.description: Recurrent inundation from Sg. Batu Kawa overflow. Residential area of ~3,500 households targeted by RM 58.5M retention pond mitigation project (completion 2027).

properties.name: Kampung Sinar Budi Baru
properties.description: Adjacent to Taman Desa Wira. Part of 58-hectare mitigation zone. Kampung-level drainage regularly overwhelmed after >30mm/3h events.

properties.name: Matang Jaya
properties.description: 1–2 m flood depths recorded. Low-lying relative to Sarawak River main channel. High-density residential; evacuation-prone during northeast monsoon.

properties.name: Sungai Maong Basin
properties.description: Sg. Maong backs up rapidly when Sarawak River level rises. Connected drainage to Jalan Satok and Jalan Green downstream reaches.
properties.sourceNote: MPP drainage map; DayakDaily flood reports

properties.name: Jalan Satok / Stapok Corridor
properties.description: Commercial and residential strip. Surface flooding from Sg. Maong backflow common during heavy rain coinciding with high tide.

properties.name: Pending Industrial Area
properties.description: Low-lying industrial zone on Sarawak River estuary. Storm surge risk compounds rainfall events. Occasional road closure on Jalan Pending.

properties.name: Jalan Astana / Waterfront
properties.description: Heritage waterfront zone susceptible to Sarawak River high-water events. Tidal influence amplifies monsoon flood risk. Climate projections suggest 1–4 m by 2050.
properties.sourceNote: Frontiers in Water (2022) — SLR scenario modelling

properties.name: Penrissen Road Corridor
properties.description: Seasonal road ponding on the main southern artery. Affects MPP urban-rural transition zone. Drainage widening ongoing as of 2025.

properties.name: Jln Kuching-Serian / Kota Padawan
properties.description: Seasonal flooding along the Kuching-Serian trunk road in Kota Padawan growth area. New developments accelerating impervious surface; drainage capacity lagging.

properties.name: Siburan Lowlands
properties.description: Siburan river flats flood seasonally. Remote from main urban core but relevant as a Padawan growth frontier. Affected in Jan 2025 multi-district event.
properties.sourceNote: DID Sarawak 2025 flood records; Borneo Post
